SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.automation

Class WriteValidationResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.automation.WriteValidationResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class WriteValidationResult extends Object implements Serializable
Outcome of a write validation. Carries a pass/fail flag together with a structured reason that can be returned to the calling agent as JSON.

Use the static factory methods ok() for a passing check and fail(String, String) or warn(String, String) for a failure or warning. The severity field distinguishes hard rejections (ERROR) from soft hints (WARNING) — only ERROR-level results abort a transactional batch.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

    • serialVersionUID

      private static final long serialVersionUID
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • OK_INSTANCE

      private static final WriteValidationResult OK_INSTANCE

    • severity

      private final WriteValidationResult.Severity severity

    • code

      private final String code

    • message

      private final String message

  • Constructor Details

    • WriteValidationResult

      public WriteValidationResult(WriteValidationResult.Severity severity, String code, String message)
      Creates a validation result.
      Parameters:
      severity - the severity classification; never null
      code - a short machine-readable code such as "OUTLET_PRESSURE_BELOW_INLET", or null for WriteValidationResult.Severity.OK
      message - a human-readable explanation, or null for WriteValidationResult.Severity.OK

  • Method Details

    • ok

      public static WriteValidationResult ok()
      Returns the shared OK instance.
      Returns:
      a passing validation result

    • fail

      public static WriteValidationResult fail(String code, String message)
      Creates a hard-failure validation result.
      Parameters:
      code - the machine-readable code
      message - the human-readable explanation
      Returns:
      a failing validation result with severity WriteValidationResult.Severity.ERROR

    • warn

      public static WriteValidationResult warn(String code, String message)
      Creates a soft-warning validation result.
      Parameters:
      code - the machine-readable code
      message - the human-readable explanation
      Returns:
      a validation result with severity WriteValidationResult.Severity.WARNING

    • getSeverity

      public WriteValidationResult.Severity getSeverity()
      Returns the severity of this result.
      Returns:
      the severity; never null

    • isAllowed

      public boolean isAllowed()
      Returns whether the write should be allowed. Both OK and WARNING are considered passing.
      Returns:
      true if the write is allowed

    • getCode

      public String getCode()
      Returns the machine-readable code, or null for WriteValidationResult.Severity.OK.
      Returns:
      the code or null

    • getMessage

      public String getMessage()
      Returns the human-readable explanation, or null for WriteValidationResult.Severity.OK.
      Returns:
      the message or null

    • toJson

      public com.google.gson.JsonObject toJson()
      Renders this result as a JSON object suitable for inclusion in TransactionalBatchResult payloads.
      Returns:
      a JSON object with severity, code and message fields
